CSP keh rahe hain ki unhe net box replacement aur maintenance form chahiye.

CSP keh rahe hain ki unka ek CX ka new installation karne aaye hain. Unka kehna hai ki CX ne 100 rupaye ka booking aur 300 ka security pay kar diya hai. Ab aage ka process kya hai, yeh batayein. Maine CSP ko guide kiya hai ki 100 booking ka hota hai aur 300 security ka. Iske baad Wiom ki taraf se 2 din ka trial milta hai. Uske baad CX apni marzi se 1, 7, ya 28 din ka recharge kar sakte hain. Aapko ISP se 100 Mbps ka 30 din ka recharge karna hai, jiska fixed payout 300 per active customer milega.

CSP ka kehna hai ki unko IP chahiye net box ko login karne ke liye. Maine WhatsApp pe bheja, lekin CSP keh rahe hain ki mere phone mein internet hai. Maine text message bhi kiya, par unka kehna hai nahi aaya, isliye maine unko verbally bata diya.
CSP ka kehna hai ki net box replacement ka process bata dijiye. Maine form bhej diye hain, CSP ko bola hai ki form bhar dijiye, agar koi issue aata hai to batana.
